constraints.layout_style: fieldset stacks with legend-only section titles

required_complexity_patterns.notes: At least two fields with aria-label only and no visible label element
Field labeled via aria-labelledby pointing at hidden or distant span
Phone split into country code select and local number input in separate wrappers
At least one readonly or disabled input with prefilled profile value
Label text split across multiple spans with no space between words

prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real ashby-style job application (single-page, small, tier=high). Widgets: combobox. Required: At least two fields with aria-label only and no visible label element Required: Field labeled via aria-labelledby pointing at hidden or distant span Required: Phone split into country code select and local number input in separate wrappers Required: At least one readonly or disabled input with prefilled profile value Required: Label text split across multiple spans with no space between words Reference DOM (Off-screen positioned input): Input positioned at -9999px off-screen (accessibility anti-pattern) Reference DOM (Conditional radio reveal): Selecting Yes on sponsorship reveals follow-up textarea Reference DOM (Micro1 Q label pattern): micro1-inspired step-2 labels like Q2.full name with dot separator Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: aria-label-only, aria-labelledby-hidden, split-phone, readonly-prefill, glued-label-text. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: fieldset stacks with legend-only section titles. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: Off-screen positioned input; Conditional radio reveal; Micro1 Q label pattern.
